response:
Yes, this feeling of insignificance is a very common human experience on the path.  
Many people wrestle with thoughts that their actions do not matter in the grand scheme of the path.  
Recognizing that you are not alone in this struggle can be the first step toward finding a new path.  
Even small acts of kindness can ripple outward and change someone else's path.  
Your existence holds value simply because you are here to walk your own unique path.
